{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318211758E1110E4F7DF54E5EE9"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595449685629797182","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"1本书非常好！越听`越好听！感谢作者"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768456672,"group_id":"7592491801689214014","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+shEipPmlDUdByXhIpPKt79R9MJikUccVj4obyubVjN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789360&x-signature=kF0qy%2FZCs5KDejK6auO%2FMmXI91c%3D","user_id":"3680815582555310","user_name":"爱吃豆沙馅麻团的白疼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3680815582555310","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1708950083,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592491801689214014","book_info":{"abstract":"师父去世前说：你不是孤儿，去江城找你姨妈。
叶辰下山，本想找到亲人，平静生活。
没想到——
随手救了个老人，是退休将军。
开了家诊所，成了网红神医。
参加个交流会，掀翻三百年世家。
更没想到——
师父是他亲爷爷。
父母是被人害死的。
凶手是国际医药巨头。
神农系统激活，每日签到获得逆天医术。
透视神瞳开启，一眼看穿病灶根源。
青云医典解锁，失传绝学重现人间。
欧阳家勾结罗斯制药，进行非法人体实验。
父母发现真相，惨遭灭口。
爷爷隐姓埋名二十年，只为保他平安。
如今，他医术大成，羽翼渐丰。
这笔血债，该算了！
一针定生死，一方断阴阳。
他在江城开医馆，明面上悬壶济世。
他在暗中查真相,步步为营布局复仇。
罗斯制药、暗夜财团、那些藏在黑暗中的恶人——
你们的末日，到了！
医者仁心，但我的仁心，只给好人！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6e49226d84c1585bf89de0ab9a5f80ad~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"小桥流水瘦马","author_id":"","book_id":"7592491801689214014","book_name":"神医下山：开局签到逆天医术","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5440人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592492723316195902","read_count":"5440","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"558402"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"171","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,神医,系统,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6e49226d84c1585bf89de0ab9a5f80ad~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445277&x-signature=klDfQ5b68Dz8K54p4OY8k4B2vPk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6906486665","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318211758E1110E4F7DF54E5EE9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6311,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11249,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":710},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_au
